claim: Novelty search and minimal-criterion coevolution share a stagnation failure mode when the criterion is too weak to constrain the archive.
join_rationale: Joining the novelty-archive saturation analysis from the first paper with the criterion-threshold argument from the second yields a single shared condition under which both processes stall.

sources.title: Example novelty-search paper
sources.supporting_quote: the archive saturates when novelty pressure is unbounded

sources.title: Example minimal-criterion coevolution paper
sources.supporting_quote: a criterion that is too permissive fails to drive continued adaptation

grounding.note: Both quotes drawn from abstracts; full-text verification warranted for the saturation mechanism but not performed this run.

novelty_note: not found in current archive / searched set
